principle: Build less; bind existing router, decision, and agent assets into the gated StaffordOS execution path.

task_selection_owner.decision: Keep select_next_task_v1 as the current operational selector, then evaluate whether next_action_engine or resolve_primary_action should become upstream input.

agent_activation_owner.decision: Do not create a duplicate agent activation router yet. Use existing agent selector/map as source of truth.

execution_owner.decision: All work lands only through gated runner path.

console_ingestion_owner.decision: Console/chat-style commands should resolve into task_type and call the gated runner path, not direct shell/git.

next_binding_tasks.purpose: Refresh QA/validator map so every task has an expected artifact and validation owner.
Bind selected task_type from existing router/decision assets into run_task_with_commit_gate_v1.sh.
Make operator console submit task_type into gated execution path.
Only after product boundary, validator map, and gated routing are proven.
